name: CyberStep, Inc.
summary: CyberStep, Inc. publishes online games in Japan. The company offers Onigiri, GetAmped2, CosmicBreak, GetAmped, C21, CosmicBreak2, and Toreba online games. It also operates in the United States, Taiwan, Korea, the Netherlands, Brazil, and Indonesia. CyberStep, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
